steps.t: Shákrug's stronghold is located in Maudhúl Grak. You should find and defeat Shákrug.
Shákrug's stronghold is located in Maudhúl Grak. You should find and defeat Shákrug.
Bregdal is in Shákrug's stronghold. You should rescue Bregdal.
Bregdal is outside of Maudhúl Grak. You should speak with Bregdal.
Ghân-buri-Ghân can be found in Drû Bhûta. You should return to Ghân-buri-Ghân with the head of Shákrug.
